title: Competitive FIGS-vs-Baselines Comparison: Friedman/Nemenyi, Bayesian Tests, Effect Sizes, and Paper Tables
summary: Demo notebook loading pre-computed evaluation results comparing 3 FIGS variants (axis-aligned, random-oblique, signed-spectral) against 3 baselines (EBM, Random Forest, Logistic/Ridge) across 5 Grinsztajn benchmarks. Recomputes Friedman test + Nemenyi post-hoc from per-dataset means, displays Bayesian signed-rank tests, Cohen's d effect sizes, per-dataset results table, interpretability comparison, timing ratios, and winner analysis. Includes per-example accuracy recomputation from 15 demo examples (5 datasets x 3 each) and a 4-panel matplotlib visualization dashboard. Uses mini_demo_data.json (48KB) with full metadata sections and curated examples.
